class RecursiveResult:
    answer: "str | None" = None
    evidence_node_ids: tuple[NodeId, ...] = ()
    evidence_texts: tuple[str, ...] = ()
    depth_reached: int = 0
    sub_answers: tuple["RecursiveResult", ...] = ()
    trace: tuple[tuple[int, str, float], ...] = ()
